message:
fix: detect cross-rig contamination in post-migration check (bd-73cf5)

When Dolt has more issues than JSONL, the post-migration check now
distinguishes between cross-rig contamination (foreign-prefix issues
from other rigs sharing the same Dolt database) and ephemeral issues.
Previously it always reported "ephemeral issues not in JSONL" which
was misleading when the real cause was cross-rig contamination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
